de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessStatement

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<SourceElement>
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessStatement
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>, IExecutionStatement
    Enclosing class:
    ExecutionNodeReader

    public static class ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessStatement
extends ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<SourceElement>
implements IExecutionStatement
    An implementation of IExecutionStatement which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

        pathConditionChanged - Is the path condition changed compared to parent?
